basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Senior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Administrative Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Full time Any UG/ Any Non-Engineering PG in Computer Science / Computer Applications, At least 5 years of Relevant Experience in Administrative
qualification.details: Full time Any UG/ Any Non-Engineering PG in Computer Science / Computer Applications. At least 5 years of Relevant Experience in Administrative. Exposure in Research Centre is desirable.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Senior Administrative Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Madras Senior Administrative Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Senior Administrative Assistant post at IIT Madras is 11 May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a full-time UG degree or a Non-Engineering PG degree in Computer Science or Computer Applications. Additionally, at least 5 years of relevant administrative experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Administrative Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 45,500/- per month for the Senior Administrative Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Administrative Assistant position at IIT Madras through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Madras Senior Administrative Assistant recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Senior Administrative Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Test/Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in these stages.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Senior Administrative Assistant position at IIT Madras is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Madras located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with experience in a research center apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with at least 5 years of relevant administrative experience are eligible. Exposure in a research center is considered desirable but not mandatory.
